news.t: Federated Hermes, Inc. launches four MDT quantitative active ETFs

overview.description: The Federated Hermes Short Duration High Yield ETF (FHYS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund seeks high current income through the active management of short-term US dollar-denominated corporate debt securities that are rated below investment-grade. FHYS was launched on Dec 16, 2021 and is issued by Federated Hermes.

data.title: Federated Hermes, Inc. launches four MDT quantitative active ETFs
data.text: •  New products double the number of Federated Hermes ETFs  PITTSBURGH , July 31, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Federated Hermes, Inc. (NYSE: FHI), a global leader in investment management, today announced the...
